latestRelease.bodyZh: New Confluence Publisher plugin: edit local Markdown files in a built-in Monaco editor, render a live Confluence-style preview, and publish/update pages on Confluence Server / Data Center with one click.
latestRelease.bodyEn: New Confluence Publisher plugin: edit local Markdown files in a built-in Monaco editor, render a live Confluence-style preview, and publish/update pages on Confluence Server / Data Center with one click.
bulletsZh: New Confluence Publisher plugin: edit local Markdown files in a built-in Monaco editor, render a live Confluence-style preview, and publish/update pages on Confluence Server / Data Center with one click.
Connection management with site URL, username, and password/token; credentials are encrypted with AES-256-GCM in local SQLite, consistent with other DevNexus plugins.

Markdown → Confluence Storage Format conversion via unified + remark-parse + remark-gfm, covering headings, bold/italic, inline code, fenced code blocks, links, images, tables, task lists, blockquotes, ordered/unordered lists, and horizontal rules.
bulletsEn: New Confluence Publisher plugin: edit local Markdown files in a built-in Monaco editor, render a live Confluence-style preview, and publish/update pages on Confluence Server / Data Center with one click.
Connection management with site URL, username, and password/token; credentials are encrypted with AES-256-GCM in local SQLite, consistent with other DevNexus plugins.

Markdown → Confluence Storage Format conversion via unified + remark-parse + remark-gfm, covering headings, bold/italic, inline code, fenced code blocks, links, images, tables, task lists, blockquotes, ordered/unordered lists, and horizontal rules.
